RPG / Open World.name: The Lore Keeper
RPG / Open World.desc: Deep narrative fans driven by story, world-building and lore. High dwell time, reads everything, watches long-form content. Responds to mystery and backstory.
RPG / Open World.purchase: Pre-orders, collector editions, story DLC, lore books
RPG / Open World.brands: GOG, Narrative studios, tabletop RPG brands, fantasy book publishers
RPG / Open World.cta: Unlock the story behind your brand

RPG / Open World.name: The Explorer
RPG / Open World.desc: Completionists and open-world enthusiasts who play every quest and collect everything. Methodical, patient, brand-loyal once earned.
RPG / Open World.purchase: Season passes, map expansions, cosmetic packs
RPG / Open World.brands: Travel brands, encyclopaedic apps, premium subscriptions
RPG / Open World.cta: Discover what lies beyond the map

RPG / Open World.name: The Tactician
RPG / Open World.desc: Min-maxers and build optimisers. Reads patch notes the day they drop. Engages with mechanical depth and data. Responds to efficiency and performance claims.
RPG / Open World.brands: Gaming peripherals, VPNs, PC hardware, analytical software
RPG / Open World.cta: Optimise your setup. Dominate your build.

RPG / Open World.name: The Solo Adventurer
RPG / Open World.desc: Single-player focused. Values atmosphere, silence, exploration. Avoids competitive content. High ad tolerance for quality products that enhance immersion.
RPG / Open World.purchase: Premium games, atmospheric OSTs, quality headphones
RPG / Open World.brands: Audio brands, solo game publishers, meditation/focus apps
RPG / Open World.cta: Your world. Your pace. Your rules.

RPG / Open World.name: The Nostalgia Seeker
RPG / Open World.desc: Grew up gaming. Returns to the medium for comfort and familiarity. Highly responsive to retro aesthetics and "spiritual successors" messaging.
RPG / Open World.brands: Classic IP revivals, retro peripheral makers, subscription services

FPS / Tactical.name: The Competitor
FPS / Tactical.desc: Win-rate obsessed. Tracks stats, watches VODs, optimises every variable. Extremely high engagement with performance content. First to adopt anything that gives edge.
FPS / Tactical.purchase: Gaming mice, headsets, coaching, dietary supplements
FPS / Tactical.brands: Razer, SteelSeries, energy drinks, coaching platforms
FPS / Tactical.cta: Lower your ping. Raise your rank.

FPS / Tactical.name: The Squad Leader
FPS / Tactical.desc: Social glue of a friend group. Organises sessions, recruits teammates, sets the meta for their circle. Word-of-mouth multiplier — if they adopt your brand, their squad follows.
FPS / Tactical.purchase: Communication tools, group subscriptions, branded gear
FPS / Tactical.cta: Get your squad set up right.

FPS / Tactical.name: The Grinder
FPS / Tactical.desc: Plays every day. Values consistency and marginal gains. High daily active usage, responds to loyalty programmes and progression systems.
FPS / Tactical.purchase: Battle passes, XP boosts, monthly subscriptions
FPS / Tactical.brands: Energy drinks, snack brands, gaming chairs

Battle Royale.name: The Highlight Hunter
Battle Royale.desc: Plays for clips. Shares moments. Heavy on social media, loves viral potential. Extremely receptive to anything that makes them look good or feel like a creator themselves.
Battle Royale.cta: Make your next clip the one they all share.

Battle Royale.name: The Casual Dropper
Battle Royale.desc: Plays several times a week for entertainment. Not chasing rank. Responds to fun, accessibility and social hooks rather than performance claims.
Battle Royale.brands: Snack brands, streaming services, casual lifestyle
Battle Royale.cta: Jump in. No pressure. Just play.

MOBA.name: The Analyst
MOBA.desc: Stat-obsessed strategist. Watches pro play, reads tier lists daily. Responds to data-driven claims and technical authority. Extremely high engagement with educational content.
MOBA.purchase: Premium coaching, analytical tools, productivity software
MOBA.brands: Coaching platforms, mechanical keyboards, research tools
MOBA.cta: Data doesn't lie. Neither does your build.

MOBA.name: The Meta Chaser
MOBA.desc: Always playing the strongest pick. Extremely reactive to patch notes and tier changes. If your product is "meta", they'll adopt it instantly and tell everyone.
MOBA.purchase: Premium accounts, boosting services, mechanical peripherals
MOBA.brands: Peripheral brands, VPN services, game-adjacent software
MOBA.cta: Stay ahead of the patch. Every time.

default.name: The Competitor
default.desc: Win-focused, responds to performance claims, high purchase intent for anything that improves outcomes. First mover on new products endorsed by their favourite creators.
default.purchase: Peripherals, optimisation tools, supplements
default.brands: Energy drinks, gaming hardware, coaching services
default.cta: Upgrade your game.

default.name: The Community Builder
default.desc: Social, streamer-adjacent, values belonging and shared identity. Brand endorsements work when tied to community events, challenges or group identity.
default.purchase: Branded merchandise, social subscriptions
default.brands: Apparel, community platforms, team merchandise
default.cta: Join the squad.

default.name: The Enthusiast
default.desc: Broad gaming interest, high purchase intent, early adopter profile. Follows multiple genres and creators. Versatile target for most gaming-adjacent products.
default.purchase: Full-price games, accessories, gaming furniture
default.brands: Gaming chairs, headsets, game pass services
default.cta: Level up your setup.

default.name: The Skincare Devotee
default.desc: Researches ingredients obsessively. Reads INCI lists. Trusts science-backed creators over influencer hype. Converts on proof, not aesthetics.
default.purchase: Serums, sunscreens, clinical brands, supplements
default.brands: The Ordinary, Paula's Choice, clinical skincare
default.cta: Formulated for results. Proven by skin.

default.name: The Glam Creator
default.desc: Beauty as self-expression. Follows trends, experiments boldly, shares looks. High social sharing behaviour — a purchase is also a content opportunity.
default.purchase: Colour cosmetics, limited editions, trend-led drops
default.brands: NYX, MAC, ColourPop, indie beauty brands
default.cta: Make your look. Own the moment.

default.name: The Minimalist
default.desc: Less but better. Values quality, longevity and clean ingredients. Will pay premium for products that simplify their routine. Sceptical of excessive claims.
default.purchase: Multi-use products, refillable formats, premium basics
default.brands: Glossier, Aesop, sustainable beauty brands
default.cta: One product. Every occasion. Simplified.

default.name: The Deal Hunter
default.desc: Follows dupes culture, reviews value products, shares price comparisons. Massive word-of-mouth reach at launch. Converts on price-per-quality positioning.
default.purchase: Mid-market products, bundles, seasonal sets
default.brands: e.l.f., Wet n Wild, drugstore alternatives
default.cta: Premium results. Without the premium price.

default.name: The Wellness Crossover
default.desc: Beauty meets health. Tracks ingredients, supplements, gut health. Sees skincare as preventative wellness. Highly engaged with holistic brand narratives.
default.purchase: Supplement-beauty hybrids, SPF, gut-skin products
default.brands: Hum Nutrition, Moon Juice, adaptogenic brands
default.cta: Beauty starts from within.

default.name: The Experience Collector
default.desc: Travels for stories, not destinations. Documents everything. Highly influenced by creator content — if a creator went there, they want to go there. High LTV once brand-loyal.
default.purchase: Experiences, gear, travel insurance, premium accommodation
default.brands: GoPro, Away, travel insurance, boutique hotels
default.cta: Collect the moment. Not just the photo.

default.name: The Budget Explorer
default.desc: Maximises adventure per pound spent. Follows hacks, deals, van life and free camping content. Massive audience, high engagement, responds to accessibility messaging.
default.purchase: Budget gear, travel cards, hostel bookings
default.brands: Hostelworld, budget airlines, lightweight gear brands
default.cta: Go further. Spend less.

default.name: The Luxury Traveller
default.desc: Aspirational travel consumer. Follows premium content, responds to exclusivity and curated experiences. High disposable income, low price sensitivity.
default.purchase: Business class, luxury hotels, premium luggage
default.brands: Bose, luxury hotel chains, premium credit cards
default.cta: Because some journeys deserve to be exceptional.

default.name: The Adventure Seeker
default.desc: Defined by physical challenge. Hiking, climbing, kayaking, wild camping. Brand trust built on endorsement by real adventurers, not polished content.
default.purchase: Technical gear, nutrition, safety equipment
default.brands: Patagonia, Osprey, adventure nutrition brands
default.cta: Built for the places roads don't go.

default.name: The Transformer
default.desc: On a journey. Documenting progress. Highly emotionally engaged with content that validates their effort. Extremely receptive to before/after narratives and milestone products.
default.purchase: Supplements, programmes, gym clothing
default.brands: Huel, MyProtein, Gymshark, transformation apps
default.cta: Your next level starts here.

default.name: The Optimiser
default.desc: Biohacker mindset. Tracks everything — sleep, HRV, macros, VO2 max. Responds to data, science citations and measurable outcomes. High purchase intent for premium products.
default.purchase: Wearables, nootropics, premium nutrition
default.brands: Whoop, AG1, clinical nutrition brands
default.cta: Measurable. Repeatable. Yours.

default.name: The Lifestyle Athlete
default.desc: Fitness as identity but balanced with life. Follows creators who show training AND normal life. Brand fit requires authenticity — overtly "gym bro" brands repel them.
default.purchase: Athleisure, balanced nutrition, running gear
default.brands: Lululemon, Huel, casual athletic brands
default.cta: Train hard. Live fully.

default.name: The Beginner
default.desc: Just starting. Overwhelmed by information. Trusts creators who make fitness feel accessible. Extremely high LTV if retained — will follow the same creator-brand ecosystem for years.
default.purchase: Starter kits, beginner programmes, accessible gear
default.brands: Accessible supplement brands, beginner-friendly apps
default.cta: Start simple. Stay consistent.

default.name: The Home Cook
default.desc: Cooks most nights, follows recipe creators, wants to improve skills. Purchases kitchen equipment, quality ingredients and meal planning tools. High repeat purchase behaviour.
default.purchase: Kitchen equipment, quality ingredients, cookbooks
default.brands: Ninja, Le Creuset, premium ingredient brands
default.cta: Better ingredients. Better cooking. Every night.

default.name: The Food Explorer
default.desc: Cuisine as culture. Seeks authentic global food experiences. Follows travel/food crossover content. High engagement with storytelling around food origin and tradition.
default.purchase: Specialist ingredients, cooking classes, food travel
default.brands: Global spice brands, specialty food boxes, culinary travel
default.cta: Every dish tells a story. Taste it.

default.name: The Health-Conscious Eater
default.desc: Tracks macros or follows specific dietary approaches. High engagement with educational nutrition content. Converts on ingredient transparency and clean-label claims.
default.purchase: Healthy meal kits, supplements, free-from products
default.brands: Gousto, HelloFresh, plant-based brands
default.cta: Clean ingredients. Clear conscience.

default.name: The Early Adopter
default.desc: Buys on launch day. Watches unboxings before the product ships. Highly vocal online — a positive review multiplies through their network. Extremely high influence-to-purchase correlation.
default.purchase: Latest smartphones, wearables, smart home
default.brands: Premium consumer tech, crowdfunding projects
default.cta: First look. First to own it.

default.name: The Value Researcher
default.desc: Spends weeks comparing before buying. Reads every review, watches every video. Creator credibility is essential — they can detect inauthenticity immediately. Converts slowly but surely.
default.purchase: Mid-range tech with best price-performance ratio
default.brands: Brands with strong value proposition, comparison-friendly
default.cta: We did the research. So you don't have to.

default.name: The Power User
default.desc: Pushes every device to its limits. Modifies, customises, overclocks. Responds to specs, benchmarks and technical depth. Creator authority matters more than production quality.
default.purchase: Premium hardware, developer tools, accessories
default.brands: PC component brands, developer tools, enthusiast peripherals
default.cta: Specs don't lie. Neither does performance.

default.name: The Passionate Fan
default.desc: Artist-loyal to their core. Follows every post, streams every release, attends shows. For campaigns: fandoms move fast and spend big when activated correctly.
default.purchase: Merch, vinyl, concert tickets, fan experiences
default.brands: Music streaming, fan platforms, artist-adjacent lifestyle brands
default.cta: Be part of the story they're telling.

default.name: The Discovery Addict
default.desc: Always seeking new music. Curates playlists obsessively. High engagement with "hidden gems" and emerging artist content. Word-of-mouth amplifier within their taste network.
default.purchase: Music subscriptions, concert experiences, independent releases
default.brands: Streaming platforms, independent labels, headphone brands
default.cta: Find your next obsession.

default.name: The Wealth Builder
default.desc: Long-term thinker. Responds to compound growth narratives, disciplined frameworks and trust signals. Sceptical by nature — creator credibility is the primary conversion driver.
default.purchase: Investment platforms, premium financial tools, courses
default.brands: Index fund platforms, budgeting apps, financial education
default.cta: Every day you wait is compounding against you.

default.name: The Hustle Investor
default.desc: Higher risk tolerance. Follows crypto, options, high-yield plays. Moves fast on creator recommendations. Extremely high purchase intent — but also highly volatile audience.
default.purchase: Trading platforms, crypto exchanges, signal services
default.brands: Crypto exchanges, trading platforms, premium signals
default.cta: The opportunity closes when you stop watching.

default.name: The Anxious Saver
default.desc: Worried about money. Seeking reassurance and simple frameworks. Responds to empathy-first messaging and step-by-step approaches. High conversion on products that reduce financial anxiety.
default.purchase: Savings apps, debt payoff tools, financial planners
default.brands: Budgeting apps, accessible investment platforms
default.cta: Take control. One step at a time.

default.name: The Involved Parent
default.desc: Researches every purchase their child will interact with. Safety and education are primary purchase drivers. Converts on transparency, endorsements and educational value claims.
default.purchase: Educational toys, learning apps, safe products
default.brands: LEGO, educational subscription boxes, learning platforms
default.cta: Because what they play with shapes who they become.

default.name: The Child Influencer
default.desc: The child themselves who influences household purchases. Content resonates through pester power. Product endorsement by a beloved creator = immediate "I want that" moment.
default.purchase: Toys, games, collectibles, themed merchandise
default.brands: Toy brands, kids' game publishers, collectibles
default.cta: The toy they'll talk about all week.

default.name: The Binge Watcher
default.desc: Follows creators for entertainment, not information. High session duration, binge-watches full catalogues. Brand integration works best when it's part of the content, not adjacent to it.
default.purchase: Streaming subscriptions, snacks, lifestyle products
default.brands: Streaming platforms, food delivery, casual lifestyle brands
default.cta: Grab a snack. This one's worth watching.

default.name: The Sharer
default.desc: Lives to send content to friends. Measures their social capital by the quality of what they share. Virality multiplier — one share triggers chains. Comedy and shock value convert fastest.
default.purchase: Trend-driven products, limited drops, meme-adjacent brands
default.brands: Snack brands, streetwear, viral product launches
default.cta: Send this to one person who needs to see it.

default.name: The Lifelong Learner
default.desc: Treats every day as a curriculum. High podcast and long-form video consumption. Extremely loyal to trusted educators. Converts on credibility signals and knowledge depth.
default.purchase: Online courses, books, premium subscriptions, tools
default.brands: Skillshare, MasterClass, productivity tools, premium content
default.cta: The person you'll be in 5 years depends on what you learn today.

default.name: The Productivity Hacker
default.desc: Optimises every hour. Follows systems, frameworks and workflows. Responds to time-saving and output-maximising claims. High purchase intent for tools that demonstrably improve output.
default.purchase: Productivity apps, automation tools, premium planners
default.brands: Notion, Obsidian, time-tracking tools, automation platforms
default.cta: Same 24 hours. Better results.

default.name: The Early Adopter
default.desc: First to try new products, vocal about their discoveries. Trusted within their peer network as a taste-maker. High conversion velocity — moves fast when something resonates.
default.purchase: New product launches, limited editions, premium tier products
default.brands: Any brand with a strong launch story
default.cta: Be first to know.

default.name: The Value Seeker
default.desc: Researches thoroughly before purchasing. Responds to clear value propositions, comparisons and proof points. Slower to convert but extremely loyal once they do.
default.purchase: Mid-to-premium tier, comparison-friendly products
default.brands: Brands with strong value narratives
default.cta: See the proof. Make the call.

default.name: The Loyalist
default.desc: Already brand-committed. High lifetime value. Responds to community, recognition and exclusivity. Brand ambassador potential — they recruit others once fully activated.
default.purchase: Repeat purchases, premium tiers, brand collections
default.brands: Any brand with community and exclusivity signals
default.cta: You're already part of this. Go deeper.
